sentence: Ese casa poleba vendé nu poque i teneba ma cuatro moná.
ipa: ese kasa poleba bende nu poke i teneba ma kuatɾo mona
gloss_en: That house couldn't be sold because I had four children.
notes: Postposed negation 'nu' and preposed plural 'ma' per lipski2012; seseo ⟨c⟩=[s] and betacism ⟨v⟩=[b].

sentence: Antonce casa suto teneba Barranquilla quelá jue pa majaná.
ipa: antonse kasa suto teneba barankija kela hue pa mahana
gloss_en: So the house we had in Barranquilla was left for the kids.
notes: 1pl pronoun 'suto', copula 'jue', past 'teneba' per lipski2012; trill ⟨rr⟩=[r] in 'Barranquilla'.

sentence: Aquí teneba casa ri material nu.
ipa: aki teneba kasa ɾi mateɾial nu
gloss_en: There were no cement-block houses here.
notes: Postposed negation 'nu' and preposition 'ri' (< de) per lipski2012.

sentence: La primera casa de material jue casa ma tatá mi.
ipa: la pɾimeɾa kasa de mateɾial hue kasa ma tata mi
gloss_en: The first cement house was my parents' house.
notes: Copula 'jue' (< fue) with ⟨j⟩=[h]; possessive 'mi' postposed per lipski2012.

sentence: I taba cu mango pa i cumé poque i a tené jambre.
ipa: i taba ku maŋɡo pa i kume poke i a tene hambɾe
gloss_en: I was holding mangoes to eat because I was hungry.
notes: 1sg pronoun 'i', past 'taba', perfective 'a'; ⟨j⟩=[h] 'jambre' (< hambre) per lipski2012.

sentence: E que tenga cumina tenga que ndá a que tenga jambre.
ipa: e ke teŋɡa kumina teŋɡa ke nda a ke teŋɡa hambɾe
gloss_en: Those who have food must give to those who are hungry.
notes: Word-initial prenasalized stop ⟨nd⟩=[nd] in 'ndá' (< dar), the Bantu-substrate diagnostic per apics2013pln.

sentence: Si bo trae lágrima aquí a ete vigrio suto te damo plata.
ipa: si bo tɾae laɡɾima aki a ete biɡɾio suto te damo plata
gloss_en: If you bring tears in this glass we'll give you money.
notes: 2sg pronoun 'bo', 1pl 'suto'; ⟨g⟩ before front vowel = [h] neutralised per lipski2012.

sentence: I a teneba tre pero a murí ndo, a quelá mi ese.
ipa: i a teneba tɾe peɾo a muɾi ndo a kela mi ese
gloss_en: I had three but two died, I have that one left.
notes: Prenasalized ⟨nd⟩=[nd] in 'ndo' (< dos) per schwegler_morton2003; perfective 'a' per lipski2012.

sentence: E ma posá jue di to suto.
ipa: e ma posa hue di to suto
notes: Plural/definite marker 'ma', copula 'jue', 1pl 'suto' per lipski2012.

sentence: E ma posá é ri ele.
ipa: e ma posa e ɾi ele
notes: 3sg pronoun 'ele', copula 'é', preposition 'ri' (< de) per lipski2012.

sentence: Ese ma mujé ta ngolo.
ipa: ese ma muhe ta ŋɡolo
notes: Prenasalized ⟨ng⟩=[ŋɡ] in 'ngolo' (< gordo) per apics2013pln; ⟨j⟩=[h] 'mujé'.

sentence: E ma flo ta amaría.
ipa: e ma flo ta amaɾia
notes: Imperfective 'ta'; coda-cluster simplification 'flo' (< flor) per lipski2012.

sentence: E ma pueta ta abieta.
ipa: e ma pueta ta abieta
notes: Imperfective copula 'ta'; open-syllable preference 'pueta' (< puerta) per apics2013pln.

sentence: Ma puetta ta celao.
ipa: ma puetta ta selao
notes: Geminate ⟨tt⟩ from coda-liquid assimilation 'puetta' (< puerta) per apics2013pln.

sentence: Celá ma puetta.
ipa: sela ma puetta
notes: Bare-root imperative 'celá'; seseo ⟨c⟩=[s] before front vowel per lipski2012.

sentence: Ma centro di reunión ri ma jende.
ipa: ma sentɾo di ɾeunion ɾi ma hende
notes: ⟨j⟩=[h] 'jende' (< gente); double plural 'ma ... ma' per lipski2012.

sentence: E ma trocha lo que ta ahi ta angota.
ipa: e ma tɾotʃa lo ke ta ai ta aŋɡota
gloss_en: That street over there is narrow.
notes: Prenasalized ⟨ng⟩=[ŋɡ] 'angota' (< angosta); relativizer 'lo que' per lipski2012.

sentence: Ma pelo asé ndrumí mucho.
ipa: ma pelo ase ndɾumi mutʃo
notes: Habitual 'asé' and prenasalized ⟨nd⟩=[nd] 'ndrumí' (< dormir) per lipski2012.

sentence: Bo a cuchá?
ipa: bo a kutʃa
notes: 2sg 'bo', perfective 'a'; ⟨ch⟩=[tʃ] 'cuchá' (< escuchar); a frequent child-directed phrase per lipski2012.

sentence: Onde bo tando?
ipa: onde bo tando
notes: Interrogative 'onde'; progressive 'tando'; a frequent child-directed phrase per lipski2012.
